notes: Base prices are regular or observed shelf prices used for meal-planning estimates.
Scraped Safeway source details are recorded per item when available and in safeway_price_observations.json.
Weekly deals override base prices when active and applicable.
Digital-only offers may require clipping the Safeway for U coupon and may have limits.
Official Safeway recipe/bundle pages are used as secondary price sources when PDP prices do not render; these are labeled in price_sources.
Safeway search/substitute API price docs are preferred when a known product ID returns an exact match.
